title: MCP optional invariant
summary: Core chat must function with all MCP servers down; degrade gracefully.
target: No error surfaced to user when MCP unavailable

title: Local dev port 8095
summary: Application listens on port 8095; PostgreSQL on 5437.

title: User-id input validation
summary: X-User-Id header/cookie validated: max 100 chars, [a-zA-Z0-9._\-@]+; invalid falls back to anonymous.

title: MCP URL SSRF prevention
summary: MCP connection URLs restricted to http/https with valid hostnames; blocks file:// and internal IPs.
